title: Vintage Le Creuset Cast Iron Casserole Dish – Model 20 – Made in France (1960–1970)
description:
Beautiful original vintage Le Creuset casserole dish, crafted from high-quality enameled cast iron. This Model 20 pan features a stunning classic color and is perfect for preparing a wide variety of dishes, from slow-cooked stews to oven-baked meals.
The cast iron ensures even heat distribution and excellent heat retention, making it compatible with all heat sources, including induction. A practical, durable, and stylish addition to any kitchen.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Model: 20
Material: Enameled cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1960–1970
Compatible with all stovetops, including induction
Condition:
Good vintage condition. As with all my items, this is a genuine vintage piece, showing its charm, patina, and character, with possible signs of age. Please check the photos carefully as they accurately show the condition.
A classic collectible piece
